rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MINNIE MARGARET SANTOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Respondent'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Responses To Request For Admission.
rulings.Rulings: The motion to vacate the deemed admissions and to permit filing of responses is granted. In light of the evidence concerning Respondent Mary Lopez¿ incapacity, the Court cannot say that her neglect in not timely responding was clearly inexcusable or that Contestant John Santos will suffer substantial prejudice as a result of this ruling permitting the petition to go forward on its merits. Ms. Lopez¿ responses must be filed within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. She must also reimburse Contestant for costs incurred as a result of her failure to timely respond, including his reasonable fees and costs incurred in bringing the motion for summary judgment based on the deemed admissions. If the parties are unable to reach agreement on the amount to be reimbursed, Mr. Santos may establish that amount by separate motion, the reasonable fees and costs of which will also be reimbursable. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, 3/6/12.
